reviews.review_description: Installed it twice and each time the app looks to be incomplete. Starts with a screen showing a grey and pink button but no text. Settings brings up a similier screen with no text.

developer_response.body: We apologize for any inconvenience caused. May I ask which model of device you are using?

reviews.review_description:
The app is currently almost not usable. Hopefully all is fixed once my kickstarter 3D camera arrives.
The menu only works when the headset language is set to US English. The login menu is very hard to access with the controllers on the meta quest pro.  Creating an account is impossible iIt says ‘failed to send verification code’ .
Hopefully we will see soon another beta on app labs.

Update: verification code now works. After login the app runs much smoother. The content is limited without much variety, but I am sure that will get better in the future.

I genuinely don't see the point of this app. I have just bought a Calf Visinse VR180 3D camera and assumed that this would be the app I needed to connect my Quest 3 to the camera. But no, it's just another rather poor social media thing with nothing of any interest in terms of content. I can't believe anyone would actually pay for the "VIP" version, which apparently just stops the videos from being interrupted every few seconds. Completely useless.

This software, CalVR, has the potential to be the best VR video player on the Meta platform.

The models, the lighting, the framing, and the music are excellent and transport us into a dream; it’s very meditative.

The negative points: there are too many bugs, not enough videos, the graphical interface needs to be reviewed, and there’s no community space for exchange and conversation.

It would also be good to have medium-length videos like on TikTok.

Message to the developers: your program has potential, but you need to work on improving CalVR.

reviews.review_title: To people who have a problem of texts
reviews.review_description:
I had the same issue.
I changed my language setting from Japanese to English(US) in Quest system settings, then those texts all appeared.
It seems this app only show English or Chinese texts.

Another point.
You must log in with SMS verification code everytime after logged out.
I hope this is only a trial system before their official launch in the next week.

developer_response.body: We will shortly release the next version, which will have support for numerous languages, including Japanese. Thank you for your support! In future versions, we will also improve the login process.

reviews.review_description: The app's content seems to be mosly limited to girls dancing and not categorized.  Hopefully there will be hand tracking.

I would like to browse more content but you get only default 6~7 videos and it keeps telling you to login in the most english unfriendly way possible which I have no idea how. I also get the same buttons with no text. Im using the Meta Quest 2 like most of the fellas here OBVIOUSLY.
This is not quite the same as any other VR video app! Wonderful VR environment short videos! Really enjoy videos, music and live streams

reviews.review_title: Lots of VR videos, not bad!
reviews.review_description: When I scroll this, it makes me feel like I'm living in a short video world.
Decent content, but the buffering and stuttering during playback impact the viewing experience.
This is a wonderful APP for everyone!  I would like to share it with my friends .
I find some are very low quality but many are awesome!
Although there are some problems, but still a very promising app, look forward to more exciting content…

reviews.review_title: good video quality, but not the content
reviews.review_description: The app seems to have much higher quality than YouTube. But I was hoping to see more usage than just women standing in front of the camera making suggestive movements.
